execution_results.previous_definition:
create or replace view VW_CUSTOMER_SEGMENTATION(
	CUSTOMER_ID,
	CUSTOMER_REGION,
	CUSTOMER_TIER,
	TOTAL_ORDERS,
	LIFETIME_VALUE,
	LAST_ORDER_DATE,
	FIRST_ORDER_DATE,
	CUSTOMER_TENURE_DAYS
) as
SELECT DISTINCT
    fs.CUSTOMER_ID,
    fs.CUSTOMER_REGION,
    fs.CUSTOMER_TIER,
    (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs2 WHERE fs2.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
    (SELECT SUM(fs3.NET_AMOUNT) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs3 WHERE fs3.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID) AS LIFETIME_VALUE,
    (SELECT MAX(fs4.ORDER_DATE) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs4 WHERE fs4.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID) AS LAST_ORDER_DATE,
    (SELECT MIN(fs5.ORDER_DATE) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs5 WHERE fs5.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID) AS FIRST_ORDER_DATE,
    DATEDIFF('day', 
        (SELECT MIN(fs6.ORDER_DATE) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs6 WHERE fs6.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID),
        (SELECT MAX(fs7.ORDER_DATE) FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs7 WHERE fs7.CUSTOMER_ID = fs.CUSTOMER_ID)
    ) AS CUSTOMER_TENURE_DAYS
FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs
WHERE fs.STATUS = 'completed' OR fs.STATUS = 'shipped' OR fs.STATUS = 'delivered' OR fs.STATUS = 'processing';
execution_results.executed_sql:
CREATE OR REPLACE VIEW HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_MART.VW_CUSTOMER_SEGMENTATION AS
WITH fact_filtered AS (
    SELECT
        fs.CUSTOMER_ID,
        fs.CUSTOMER_REGION,
        fs.CUSTOMER_TIER,
        fs.NET_AMOUNT,
        fs.ORDER_DATE
    FROM HAFID_OPTIM_CLONE_1.PIPELINE_DWH.FACT_SALES fs
    WHERE fs.STATUS IN ('completed', 'shipped', 'delivered', 'processing')
),
agg_by_customer AS (
    SELECT
        CUSTOMER_ID,
        /* COUNT of qualifying orders */
        COUNT(*) AS TOTAL_ORDERS,
        /* Sum of NET_AMOUNT for lifetime value */
        SUM(NET_AMOUNT) AS LIFETIME_VALUE,
        /* First and last order dates */
        MIN(ORDER_DATE) AS FIRST_ORDER_DATE,
        MAX(ORDER_DATE) AS LAST_ORDER_DATE
    FROM fact_filtered
    GROUP BY CUSTOMER_ID
)
SELECT DISTINCT
    f.CUSTOMER_ID,
    f.CUSTOMER_REGION,
    f.CUSTOMER_TIER,
    a.TOTAL_ORDERS,
    a.LIFETIME_VALUE,
    a.LAST_ORDER_DATE,
    a.FIRST_ORDER_DATE,
    DATEDIFF('day', a.FIRST_ORDER_DATE, a.LAST_ORDER_DATE) AS CUSTOMER_TENURE_DAYS
FROM fact_filtered f
JOIN agg_by_customer a
    ON a.CUSTOMER_ID = f.CUSTOMER_ID
